message:
chore(gitignore): add patterns for recurring ephemeral agent artifacts

Adds .gitignore patterns for files that repeatedly appear as untracked
detritus from multi-agent development sessions:

- __pycache__/ (Python bytecode cache from scripts/)
- /clippy.txt (clippy lint output)
- ubs-output*.txt (UBS scanner output, dash-separated variant)
- /run_*.rs (one-off test runner scripts at root)
- /find_*.rs, /gen_*.rs, /fix_*.py (scratch scripts at root)
- /*.pem, /req.cnf, /v3.ext (temporary TLS/X.509 test artifacts)
- /test_match, /test_oncelock, /test_parse, /test_peek_pop,
  /test_script (compiled test binaries without extensions)
- /test_results.txt, /test_tokio_oncecell/ (test output artifacts)
- **/*_test_bug.rs (scratch bug reproduction files in source tree)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -115,6 +115,7 @@ artifacts/
 
 # UBS (Ultimate Bug Scanner) output
 ubs_*.txt
+ubs-output*.txt
 
 # Generic scratch output
 output.txt
@@ -133,12 +134,37 @@ output.txt
 /test_seed.rs
 /test_seed_*
 /test_vecdeque.rs
+/test_match
+/test_oncelock
+/test_parse
+/test_peek_pop
+/test_script
+/test_results.txt
+/test_tokio_oncecell/
 
 # One-off test runner scripts
 /run_test.sh
+/run_*.rs
 
 # Standalone bug reproduction / debugging harnesses
 src/channel/deadlock_test.rs
+**/*_test_bug.rs
+
+# Python bytecode cache
+__pycache__/
+
+# Clippy output
+/clippy.txt
+
+# Root-level scratch scripts and one-off harnesses
+/find_*.rs
+/gen_*.rs
+/fix_*.py
+
+# Temporary TLS/X.509 test artifacts at root
+/*.pem
+/req.cnf
+/v3.ext
 
 # FrankenSuite sub-project stray test artifact dirs
 franken_decision/false/
